positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical circular emblem featuring a majestic, abstract mountain range silhouette at sunrise. The range is rendered in deep indigo and slate grey tones. In the foreground, a minimalist, geometric depiction of a lone deer's head and antlers emerges, stylized with crisp linework and gold foil accents. Incorporate abstract elements like stylized flowing ribbons and radiating sun rays that frame the central subject. Use a clean, two-color complementary palette (deep blue/indigo and burnt orange/gold) for maximum contrast. Composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a chest print on t-shirts or hoodies, with thick, clean outlines and an enamel-style fill. Minimalist, modern graphic design style. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast, crisp edges, negative space utilization, graphic novel illustration style. Studio lighting, crisp detail, art deco influence.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, words, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, grain, dirty, abstract noise, photorealistic, 3d render
